raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs. It identifies issues with citations, logical gaps, and numerical coherence.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides specific recommendations for correction.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the need to verify the Chen et al. (2025) reference and the logical gap in the closing contrast.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original, such as overclaiming and logical gaps.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the identified issues."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs. It identifies issues with citations, logical gaps, and numerical coherence.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides specific recommendations for correction.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the need to verify the Chen et al. (2025) reference and the logical gap in the closing contrast.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original, such as overclaiming and logical gaps.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the identified issues.
